---
title: "Jacob White"
subtitle: "PhD Student in Applied Mathematics & Statistics at Stony Brook University"
about:
  template: jolla       # minimalist profile layout
  image: profile.jpg    # place your photo in the project root
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ruhevoll
---

I'm a first year PhD student interested in the applications of
complex analysis and differential geometry to quantitative finance.

I write about topics I'm interested in [here](articles.qmd).
